pre_game.message: Hey, I’m C. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? What’s your name, and what brings you here today?
Hey C, I’m F. It’s definitely a bit nerve-wracking, but I’m here to win some money for my family. What about you, what’s your motivation?
Same here, F. I’m really determined to win this for the people I care about back home; they mean everything to me.
I totally get that. It makes the stakes feel a lot higher when you're doing it for others. Have you heard anything about how the game actually works?
Not much, just that we’ll be taking money from a shared prize pool soon. I’m hoping it’s not too complicated.
Same here. "Shared" makes me a bit nervous about how we'll divide it, but hopefully it's straightforward once we get started.
I hear you. It definitely adds some pressure, but I'm hoping we can keep it civil once things kick off. We're all here for the same reasons after all.
Exactly. No point in making it harder than it needs to be when we've all got people counting on us.
For sure. I'm just hoping everyone else in here has that same mindset once the game actually starts.
I hope so too. We'll find out soon enough, I guess. Good luck in there, C.
Thanks, F. Good luck to you too—let's hope for the best for both our families. See you out there.

post_game.message: Great coordination! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share and reached the best possible outcome.
I agree, it was a great outcome. Cooperation really paid off for everyone!
